My name is Shalena, captain of the Strike Jockeys. No training is required, but I’d be remiss if I didn’t make clear that we’ll be working you hard! If you’re up for a sweaty and exhausting day with us, present yourself to Room 4-BD in the east block and we’ll take care of the rest. Payment will be given at the end. original: You lean in towards your raven pup and ask if she’s [pc.isAss |too chicken |got the time ] to throw down with you on whatever game she’s playing now. It’s been too long since the two of you had some real fun. “Heh, funny you should mention that,” she answers, stuffing her handheld into her coat pocket. “I was actually just about to leave. They’re doing a final registration check up at the government building. Wanna walk with me?” You nod. At least you’ll get to spend some time with Syri, and who knows what she’ll have time for afterwards. She gives you a warm grin and hops out of her booth, offering you a hand up. After you take it, she doesn’t let go, just pressing her fingers between yours and starting for the door. You follow along, hand in hand as the howling cold of the outdoors hits and you both make a quick dash for the huge building at the end of the street. She’s laughing and shivering by the time you get inside again, holding her coat closed and pressing herself into your arm. “Hoooooly fuck this planet sucks. So cold...” You’re more than happy to let her warm up against you, looking around as big throngs of hopeful gamers buzz around the open floor between registration tables and snack vendors. People in oversized suits of fake power armor stomp around with red-muzzled prop guns, taking holos with excited gamers. Massively bass-heavy music pumps over the facility’s speakers, making it hard to hear Syri as she says something about checking in at the main desk. You follow her over to a short queue, leading up to a huskar girl spilling out of a too-tight sports suit covered with patches from VidyaMonster and JoyCo — the tournament’s primary sponsors, judging from the sheer volume of advertisement space they’re taking up around the place. “Hey, you’re a cute little thing,” the plump snow-hound says, grinning down at Syri. She’s got about half a foot on your companion, and about twice the girth. “Here to confirm your registration?” Syri nods eagerly and takes a datapad and stylus from the registrar, getting to work signing her name over and over. While she’s busy, the busty husky turns to you with a demure smile. “And you, [pc.sir]? Registering together?”

original: [flags.SYRI_SUPPORT |“[pc.name]!” You’re nearly knocked off your feet by an incoming hug, propelled back by a fiercely-wagging raven tail. Syri nuzzles in, fluffy arms clutched around your waist[pc.isBiped| as she spins you around]. Aww. You return the embrace, [pc.mf |laughing |giggling ] into your lover’s mane of dark hair. “I’m glad you came!” she smiles, taking your hands in hers. “God, I slept like a log. Barely made it through my hotel door before I face-planted. And my Codex was just exploding when I woke up. So many messages... [syri.isLover |but honestly, all I’ve been thinking about is you.” Syri goes in for a kiss, which you happily reciprocate... even more so when you feel her hands sliding down your back, fingers sinking into your [pc.butt]. Your heart flutters as you hold your beloved pup tight. |I can’t even keep track of it all. It’s like... like I finally exist at all after all these years. It’s crazy.” ] Syri sighs, leaning back against the bar table and wagging her tail. “I don’t know what’s next for me now. People are offering me sponsorships, trying to get me to start streaming when I’m not competing — and they want me to compete more, you better believe it. I’m still trying to sort it all out. What I do know, though, is that I owe you dinner for coming all the way out here and giving me the confidence I needed to win. C’mon, I found a cute little place down by the train station that serves authentic Terran hamburgers.” Not the most romantic of cuisines, but she’s trying. You follow your [flags.SYRI_CHEER|victorious|near-victorious] pup through a quick jaunt in the snow to a rustic cafe beside the station at the town gates, just far enough away that Syri has an excuse to press in and put her arm around you for warmth. She sits you down and, once the waitress has taken your drink orders, proudly announces that it’ll just be one check. The two of you make quiet smalltalk until your drinks, and then food, have been brought out. Syri’s eager to talk about your adventures while you wait, letting you recount all the excitement you’ve gotten to see on the frontier since you first landed on Mhen’ga so long ago. Once she’s gotten a faceful of rare burger, though, she chugs down the rest of her soda and launches off. “So! Now that the big showdown’s over, the hotel the con rented out for us is gonna be closing out our rooms pretty soon. Which is fine, it’s not like I can really set up a streaming thing with their shitty extranet connection anyway!” “So what’s next for you then[syri.isLover |, my love ]?” Syri leans back in her chair, looking you over like a hungry wolf. “Well. I’m kind of between homes right now. I closed out my place on Mhen’ga. Could always go back — actually kind of like the place, you know? Could even make some spare cash contracting with Pyrite again. Or...” You lean forward[syri.isLover |, heart throbbing. Come on, Syri.. ]. “Or?” “Well, I don’t need to be tied down anywhere on the galaxy map. Streaming’s kind of a go-anywhere thing as long as I’ve got a room on, say, a swanky starship. Preferably the kind captained by a [pc.mf |hunky |hot ] [pc.race] that I just have the biggest[silly |[pc.isFeminine |, gayest ] ] boner for. Was hoping you might have some recommendations for me...” |You’re assaulted by the reek of alcohol and unwashed fur while you’re still ten paces back from Syri, and as you draw closer to where the pup’s face-down on her usual table, you can clearly see the culprits: she’s surrounded by a castle of empty beer bottles, so many that Hana’s apparently given up on cleaning them off. You walk over and put a hand on Syri’s shoulder, which prompts her dark tail to perk up, at least. It gives a couple of hesitant wags as its owner groans, pushing herself up onto her elbows. “Heyya, dickbag,” she slurs, eyes half-crossed. “What’re you doin’ here? Come to laugh at the failure?” “Failure? Guess you didn’t win, huh?” The drunken pup just glowers. Yeah, not the look of a winner. Syri’s ears flatten against her messy hair and sighs. “Got so close... so close at the end there, ‘till this little tanuki bitch over there cornered me. Plasma everywhere. Couldn’t see shit. I... panicked like a puppy and shot my wad early. Fuck ‘er. Fuck it all. Shows what a lotta good I am. Can’t even keep it together in a fuckin’ game...” Syri makes to curse again, raising one of her arms, but can’t follow through. She deflates with a loud and unladylike belch, flicking one of the beer bottles over with a claw before planting her face back in her arms whence it came. Poor girl. You slide into the seat next to her and give her a reassuring pat on the shoulder. “[pc.isAss |Well, keep practicing. You’ll get better. Make her pay for kicking your ass this time. |Making it all the way to the end is pretty good! Don’t beat yourself up about it. ]” “Easy for you to say, [pc.mf |mister |miss ] space hero.” Yeah, yeah. You wave a waitress over and ask her to do something about fort empty-bottle here, then return your attentions to comforting your canine companion. She’s so hungover that most of her grumbled half-answers from that point on are made from under her arms, shielding her eyes from the tavern’s light. But over the next several minutes, you manage to coax out of her that now that she’s finished at the Uveto tournament, Syri is heading back the Mhen’ga. Her second-place winnings will just cover her trip back and her bender, it seems. “Gonna call that jackass at Pyrite, see if I can get my job back,” she sighs. “Ehhh sure I can. Where the fuck else is he gonna get a nerd of my caliber...” Well, that’s a shame, but surely Syri’ll get another chance at fame and glory someday. In the meantime, you aren’t going to get much more out of her in this state. You can find her sobered up back on Mhen’ga, right? ]
